parameters.query: SELECT m.*, l.user_id, l.stage, l.fluxo_id FROM message_history m JOIN leads l ON m.lead_id = l.id WHERE m.numero_whatsapp = $1 ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO leads (user_id, numero_whatsapp, nome, stage, criado_em) SELECT $1, $2, $2, 'whatsapp', now() WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leads WHERE user_id = $1 AND numero_whatsapp = $2) RETURNING *;
SELECT u.id, u.role, a.plano, a.status, a.creditos_tokens, a.addon_objecao, a.agentes_extras FROM profiles u JOIN assinaturas a ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE u.id = $1
SELECT conteudo, sender FROM message_history WHERE lead_id = $1 AND user_id = $2 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
INSERT INTO message_history (user_id, lead_id, numero_whatsapp, sender, conteudo, tokens_usados, agent_type) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'assistant', $4, $5, $6)

UPDATE leads SET updated_at = now(), ultima_pergunta = $1, objecoes_count = CASE WHEN $2 THEN objecoes_count + 1 ELSE objecoes_count END, stage = CASE WHEN $3 THEN 'qualified' WHEN $4 THEN 'unqualified' ELSE stage END WHERE id = $5

documentation.description: Workflow SDR completo — Multi-Agente dinâmico que roda 100% do software
features: Modelo de IA dinâmico por agente (OpenAI, Claude, Google)

requirements.supabase_credentials: Configure in N8N credentials with your Supabase project
